description_long: This shotgun features a robust, industrial design with a weathered, metallic finish and a compact, tactical profile. The body is primarily constructed from dark, worn metal with visible scratches and patina, suggesting heavy use or exposure to harsh environments. It has a prominent cylindrical component mounted above the main body, likely serving as a sight or auxiliary attachment. The stock is angular and solid, with a short, squared-off butt and a pistol grip for improved handling. The barrel is thick and integrated into the main frame, with reinforced sections and a boxy fore-end. The overall appearance is utilitarian, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on durability and function.
description: A rugged, metallic shotgun with a weathered finish, compact stock, and a prominent upper cylindrical attachment. Its design is utilitarian and built for durability.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the angular stock, pistol grip, and upper cylindrical attachment.
description_view_1: Top-down view emphasizing the width of the barrel and the symmetry of the upper attachment, with minimal detail on the stock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, showing the same key features from the other side, including the boxy fore-end and grip.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the muzzle, showing the barrel opening and the alignment of the upper attachment above the barrel.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, thick and integrated with the main frame, no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_stock_type: pistol grip with short, angular buttstock
attribute_trigger_guard_design: elongated, rectangular trigger guard with a squared profile and no visible finger grooves
